ab: CiPiya’ ko ngangan no wama ako.
CiHongay ko ngangan no wina ako.
Ira ko cecay a kaka ako to fa’inayan, ciKolas ko ngangan nira moetep ira ko cecay ko mihecaan nira.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kolas他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is kolas, he is 11 years old.

ab: Mahecad ko pitilidan niyam a kongkoan.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: Maolah romadiw’ kako ato kaka to fa’inayan.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Maolah midangoy kako, pahanhan to i, malacafay midangoy ko paro no loma’ niyam.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Molah misafaeloh a ciwidang kako, malacafay romadiw ato midangoy kami.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
